properties.evidence: No evidence was available for any statin combination vs. higher dose statin monotherapy.

rejected_candidates.text: Ezetimibe plus simvastatin therapy is more likely to result in
rejected_candidates.reason: This text does not support a direct relationship between Ezetimibe and LDL targets. It only mentions the combination of Ezetimibe with Simvastatin.

rejected_candidates.text: No evidence was available for other combinations.
rejected_candidates.reason: The text discusses comparisons between different statin combinations, but it does not provide enough information to support a relationship in either direction.
